---
title: "Cosmetics alter biologically-based factors of beauty: Evidence from facial contrast"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Russell, R., & Ward, R."
year: 2015
date: 2015-01-01
pub-journal: "Evolutionary Psychology"
volume: "13(1)"
doi: "10.1177/147470491501300113"
pdf: "assets/papers/2015/jones_etal_2015.pdf"
categories: [cosmetics, morphometrics]
---
